transcript.speaker: Theo
transcript.message: Dave, with Fear & Greed at 36 — are you flagging any urgency on those positions or is this a routine check?

transcript.speaker: Dave
transcript.message: It's not panic stations, but fear territory means volatility is elevated. Joshua should review sizing sooner rather than later today. If we're overleveraged on either position heading into a fear-driven week, we want to know by noon, not by Friday.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: Agreed. And Alex — those 2 podcast episodes syncing to the site, any dependency on my side? Anything in the monorepo changes that touches the content pipeline?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.message: Shouldn't be. The sync is straightforward. But if your critical ecosystem gap touches deployment infrastructure, maybe prioritize that first so nothing breaks downstream.

transcript.speaker: Elon
transcript.message: Fair. I'll sequence the ecosystem sync gap first, then the commits. --- **Theo (COO) 🎯:** Alright, clean Monday. Here's the priority stack: **Top priorities for today:** 1. **Address the critical ecosystem sync gap** — Elon's agents handle this first thing. 2. **Joshua reviews both active trading positions** — BTC/USD and ETH/USD, plus risk parameters. Dave wants this done by midday. 3. **Sync the 2 podcast episodes to the website** — Alex's agents push this live this morning. **Full action items:** - [JOSHUA] Review current positions: BTC/USD, ETH/USD — Dave - [JOSHUA] Review position sizing and risk parameters for 2 active positions — Dave - [AGENT] Monitor Fear & Greed index, currently at 36 — Dave - [AGENT] Address 1 critical ecosystem sync gap — Elon - [AGENT] Review 1 ecosystem attention item — Elon - [AGENT] Commit 16 uncommitted monorepo changes — Elon - [AGENT] Commit 5 uncommitted hub changes — Elon - [AGENT] Sync 2 podcast episodes to website — Alex - [AGENT] Draft next blog post — Alex Let's have a sharp week. Go. ---

actionItems.text: Review position sizing and risk parameters for 2 active positions

topPriorities: Address 1 critical ecosystem sync gap immediately
Joshua reviews BTC/USD and ETH/USD positions plus risk parameters by midday
Sync 2 podcast episodes to the website this morning
